d: Cecia summons Mr. Carlyle to a selected tile to assist. Mr. Carlyle inherits all of Cecia's stats and his normal attack deals [[170%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within a 1-tile arc. He gains an extra [[45%]] max HP but loses [[4%]] of max HP per second. When Mr. Carlyle is summoned, he initiates Tangled Agony to entangle enemies within 2 tiles, dealing [[140%]]<ATK> damage per second for [[2]]s. The entangled enemies cannot move or act. If Mr. Carlyle is already on the battlefield when this skill is used again, the skill restores his HP to Max, allowing him to cast the Tangled Agony again.
Mr. Carlyle's max HP is increased by an extra [[60%]].
Mr. Carlyle's normal attack deals [[175%]]<ATK> damage.
Mr. Carlyle's normal attack deals [[180%]]<ATK> damage.
Mr. Carlyle's normal attack deals [[185%]]<ATK> damage.
Cecia gains power from the earth to increase her and Mr. Carlyle's ATK SPD by [[45]] for [[8]]s.
Increases ATK SPD by [[50]].
Mr. Carlyle's next normal attack will be replaced with Thundering Quake, dealing [[320%]]<ATK> damage to all surrounding enemies within 2 tiles and gaining [[15]] Life Drain.
Increases ATK SPD by [[55]].
Passive. Cecia and Mr. Carlyle gain [[20]] DEF Penetration. Cecia's next normal attack is enhanced after she uses [[3]] normal attacks, dealing [[220%]]<ATK> damage.
Cecia's DEF Penetration gained from the passive effect is increased to [[25]].
The enhanced normal attack deals [[225%]]<ATK> damage.
The enhanced normal attack deals [[230%]]<ATK> damage.
Cecia increases her ATK SPD by [[15]]. She gains an extra [[9]] ATK SPD while Mr. Carlyle is on the battlefield.
Cecia increases her ATK SPD by [[20]]. She gains an extra [[12]] ATK SPD while Mr. Carlyle is on the battlefield.
Cecia increases her ATK SPD by [[25]]. She gains an extra [[15]] ATK SPD while Mr. Carlyle is on the battlefield.

Cecia entangles an enemy with reinforced Thorns, dealing [[60%]]<ATK> damage every second and the target cannot move or act for [[4]]s. Cecia absorbs [[1.5%]] of Phys DEF and Magic DEF from the target every second. The absorbed stats last until the battle ends and are also shared by Mr. Carlyle. Cecia can only absorb each target up to [[8]] times. This skill prioritizes enemies who have not reached the limit and are not in the control immunity status.
Absorbs [[1]] of the target's Vitality each time when stealing stats.
Increases the entangled targets' damage taken per second to [[70%]]<ATK>.
Increases the entangled targets' damage taken per second to [[80%]]<ATK>.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, each normal attack increases ATK SPD by [[2]] and normal attack damage by [[1%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 20 ATK SPD, 8 DEF Penetration.

d: Reduces the required normal attacks to trigger Agonizing Puncture by [[1]].
